name: california-lake
description: Lake County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: Lake County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past Lake County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('Lake County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: Lake County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract Lake County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link. Construct externalId as 'california-lake-supervisor-{district}' using the district number.
hints: externalId: construct as 'california-lake-supervisor-{district}' using the district number
The page is a single record detail view for the 'Board of Supervisors' entity, indicated by the breadcrumb 'Board of Supervisors' and the page title.
Representative data is likely contained within the main content area defined by the class 'pageContent cpGrid cpGrid24' and the 'fr-view' container.
The HTML provided is truncated ('<!-- [truncated] -->'), so evidence for specific representative fields (name, photo) is currently missing from the snippet.
The 'externalId' field requires a construction rule based on the page ID (1116) or a specific representative ID found in the full HTML.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for Lake County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: Lake County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for Lake County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: Lake County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
NOTE: UNCERTAIN — No NetFile portal found for Lake County.
